programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Hard-Fought Battle Against Pica! Zoro's Deadly Attack! : The Tontattas are in full revolt! But can they keep their wits about them long enough to make it out? Meanwhile, Zoro finally gains the upper hand against Pica, and Franky finds a way to deal with Señor Pink.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Little People's Princess! Captive Mansherry! : Franky finally makes it into the factory and the Tontattas are reunited with their captive friends! But Princess Mansherry is nowhere to be found. Factory manager Kuween becomes irate when ignored and launches an attack on Franky.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Invincible! A Gruesome Army of Headcracker Dolls! : Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo draw closer to the Flower Field on the fourth level of the Royal Palace plateau, but a sudden attack by Gladius' exploding spheres sends Robin and Bartolomeo hurtling towards the level below.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Risking Their Lives! Luffy is the Trump Card for Victory! : Rebecca makes it to the Flower Field alone, but unfortunately finds company there that is less than friendly! Meanwhile, Bartolomeo pushes himself to the limit in order to help Luffy advance, but does he leave himself vulnerable in the process?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Tearful Reunion! Rebecca and Kyros! : Diamante has Rebecca pinned and completely overpowered. If only the Soldier-san of her youth were able to protect her! Meanwhile, Luffy and Law finally surmount incredible odds to land themselves in striking distance of Doflamingo.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One Shot One Kill! The Man Who Will Save Dressrosa! : Usopp uses Viola's Clairvoyance to prepare his ammunition to take Sugar out! But the slightest hesitation now will spell disaster, and the end of Luffy! Luckily for the Straw Hats, Usopp's ammunition has been specially designed for this situation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Anger Erupts! Luffy and Law's Ultimate Stratagem! : The final showdown with Doflamingo begins, but the Warlord still has several tricks up his sleeve - including turning one of Luffy's own friends against him! Meanwhile Franky and Señor Pink are in a standoff to find out who is the coolest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Noble Family! The True Identity of Doflamingo! : All hopes rest on Luffy and Law being able to take down Doflamingo; but the Warlord has other plans in mind as he gives the two the fight of their lives, and reveals his true, shocking history! Meanwhile, Sabo finds out Fujitora's true intention…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Ultimate Power! The Secret of the Op-Op Fruit! : With Fujitora's stalemate arousing suspicion in the Navy ranks, Law and Luffy stand seconds away from execution at the hand of Doflamingo! But before he dispatches them both, he shares the secret of his sway over the Celestial Dragons!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sad Memories! Law, the Boy from the White Town! : The horrible secret of Flevance, the White Town, is revealed, giving clues to Law's traumatic past! A rage born from the lies of the World Government created a child who had the will to kill Corazon!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Celestial Dragon! Doffy's Stormy Past! : Law's attack on Corazon looks less successful than he thought! And after he's accepted into the Doflamingo Family, Corazon's mysterious silence hides a fact that may save Law's life - and a hidden danger Law must face in Doflamingo himself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Rocky Road! Law and Corazon's Journey of Life! : Things grow stranger for Law as he learns the secret behind why Corazon feigns being mute! But the mysterious Corazon's actions are only beginning to baffle Law as he takes him on a journey to cure his White Lead Disease.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Time is Ticking Down! Seize the Op-Op Fruit! : Corazon's double-dealing with the Navy raises suspicions both with Doflamingo and Law. But all that is secondary as Corazon finally has a chance to grab the Op-Op Fruit during a staged handoff arranged by the Government.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Moment of Resolution! Corazon's Farewell Smile! : The Op-Op Fruit is in Corazon's hands! But the price he paid to get it might be too high... When Law goes for help, unfortunate coincidences intervene and leave the two vulnerable! Meanwhile, Doflamingo and his clan finally land at Minion Island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Advance, Law! The Kindhearted Man's Final Fight! : Doflamingo & his Family begin to zero in on Corazon and Law's whereabouts, but Corazon has a plan to hide Law long enough to let him escape, even if that means sacrificing his own life. A chain of lucky coincidences allows the plan to be set into motion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: To Be Free! Law's Injection Shot Blasts! : Violet runs down the status of the open battles raging in Dressrosa - the Straw Hats, the Tontattas, the executives of the Doflamingo Family - all of them clash around the island, but it's Law's revelation to Doflamingo that moves the action forward!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An Intense Battle! Law vs. Doflamingo! : Luffy continues to battle Fake-mingo, but keeps accidentally battling Bellamy instead. Meanwhile the tide of battle turns against Law as painful scars from the past resurface. And Zoro gets unexpected help in his battle with Pica.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Decisive Battle Against the Executives! Proud Hajrudin! : Bellamy escapes Doflamingo's control, but it might be too late. His long history with Doflamingo unfolds and leads to an inglorious end. Meanwhile, Hajrudin has been beaten down, but a fire still burns in him to pay back the favor he owes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Battle of Love! The New Leader Sai vs. Baby 5! : Lao G and Don Chinjao duke it out as each brings their most devastating attacks to the battle. But a misunderstanding caused by Baby 5 has Sai and Don Chinjao distracted - are they distracted enough for Lao G to gain the upper hand?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Man's Pride! Bellamy's Last Charge! : Law is at the whim of Doflamingo and Trebol, while Luffy still has to deal with Bellamy, who fights to keep his honor even after being released by Doflamingo! Meanwhile, Gladius is about to detonate the ground around Cavendish and Bartolomeo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Strong Wind and a Surge! Hakuba vs. Dellinger! : A mysterious force that resembles Cavendish menaces the battlefield - but while it appears to help Bartolomeo and the others at first, it sets its sights on Robin! Meanwhile, the deeply-wounded Ideo sees Dellinger's horrible true nature!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Barrier-Barrier! Homage Holy Fist Strikes! : Bartolomeo is in a neck-and-neck battle against Gladius to save Robin, and is faced with an impossible dilemma. With all his options leading to their defeat, can his cunning ploy save the day? Meanwhile, Robin is face to face with Cavendish.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sending a Shock Wave! The Worst Generation Goes Into Action! : Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birth of the Legend! The Adventures of the Revolutionary Warrior Sabo! : The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Brothers' Bond! The Untold Story Behind Luffy and Sabo's Reunion! : Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Strongest Creature! One of the Four Emperors - Kaido, King of the Beasts! : As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fujitora Takes Action! The Complete Siege of the Straw Hats! : As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A State of Emergency! Rebecca Is Kidnapped! : Fujitora's flirting with chance has turned out poorly for the Straw Hats as the full Navy force bears down on Dressrosa searching for the pirates! Luffy and the others make a mad dash for the east port to get off the island.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Bond Between Father and Daughter! Kyros and Rebecca! : Rebecca has precious little time to follow Luffy's lead and make it to Kyros. Can she make it in time? Meanwhile, Fujitora is closing in on Bartolomeo and the other Colosseum warriors while Trafalgar Law faces the shadows of his past!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Men's Pride! Luffy vs. Fujitora, Head-to-Head! : Law and Sengoku share memories of Corazon, and the secret of Trafalgar Law's name. Meanwhile, Fujitora uses the destruction caused by the battle in Dressrosa as a weapon, and squares off one-on-one with Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: No Way Out! Admiral Fujitora's Ruthless Pursuit! : The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sons' Cups! The Straw Hat Fleet is Formed! : With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Numerous Rivals Struggle Amongst Themselves! The Raging Monsters of the New World : While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Leaving it on the Line : The final two chefs prepare for their final service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Last Chef Standing : The chefs cook five commonly served "staple" dishes, but the challenge comes with a twist: each team will have to pick one member to leave the kitchen until only one is left.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Will The Real Mr. Winkler Please Die : Nehemiah Persoff plays an obscure shopkeeper who calls himself Peter Winkler and becomes the catalyst in a plot to assassinate a high-level Iron Curtain defector.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Little Girl Blue : Nina Foch plays a grandmother whose only grandchild is kidnapped by two ineffectual crooks. As McGarrett and his Five-O forces attempt to move up the mountain where the child is being held, the kidnappers lay down a withering fuselage of rifle fire.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Percentage : A travel agent operating gambling junkets is slain as a warning to his partner to stop competing for the gambling business.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Engaged To Be Buried : McGarrett attempts to crack an extortion ring preying on small businessmen. The detective's investigation seems to run into a roadblock when it is learned that one of the gang members is courting the daughter of Chin Ho.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Bushmaster : MacGyver is called on to rescue an American cargo pilot being held on espionage charges in Central America.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Friends : MacGyver contemplates resigning from the Phoenix Foundation.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: DOA: MacGyver : A head injury resulting from a confrontation with hitmen who fear MacGyver knows too much about their assassination plot against the leaders of the Omega Forceanti-terrorist brigade, causes MacGyver (Richard Dean Anderson) to lose his memory.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: For Love or Money : MacGyver travels to Czechoslovakia to rescue a dissident from the top-security psychiatric ward of a Czech hospital.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Back From The Dead : When former mobster Jimmy "The Eraser's" new identity is exposed, MacGyver is forced into action to save Jimmy's daughter and grandson.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: The Diamond That Nobody Stole : A cat burglar strikes at the home of a socially prominent island family, setting off a fast-moving series of events that lead to a death. McGarrett's search for clues takes him to a rundown neighborhood.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Jury Of One : A police informer tells McGarrett that one of the jurors in the murder trial of island strong-arm has been bribed in an effort to produce a hung jury.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Hookman : A double amputee sets out to avenge the loss of his hands by killing every law officer who, he feels, contributed to his maiming.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Draw Me A Killer : McGarrett attempts to solve the riddle of a series of apparently motiveless slayings that come at six week intervals. The slayings — of a sailor, banker, pawnbroker and lawyer — leave the Five-O unit without clues to the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Charter For Death : Nehemiah Persoff guest stars as Leo Paoli, a deported mobster fleeing a Corsican exile and trying to get a cache of $5 million.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Time Management Hour, 5-Min Meals with Chef Rocco DiSpirito : It’s Drew’s time management hour! Time management expert Laura Vanderkam shares tips. programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Kristen Bell, Danny Seo, Drew Gooder: Good Deeds Teacher : Danny Seo whips up healthy breakfast recipes and shares ways to utilize your leftovers to help beautify yourself including a strawberry facial mask. Meet the Principal whose school started a grocery store that only accepts good deeds as a form of payment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Mayim Bialik, Weird Food Combos With TikTok Chef Eitan Bernath : “Call Me Kat” star Mayim Bialik stops by to chat. Plus, designer Melody Ehsani shares her wisdom with small business owners in our minute master class. Then, Drew taste tests some weird food combos with 18-year-old chef and TikTok star Eitan Bernath.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Josh Groban, D-I-Y Kid Craft, Cooking with Farideh : Grammy-nominated musician Josh Groban chats. Drew is joined on Zoom by kids of her show staff and The Craft Studio founder to create a fun flower craft. Executive Culinary Director at VICE Media Farideh Sadeghin teaches Drew how to make a Frito Pie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Jennifer Love Hewitt, Drew Gooder: Bus Driving Principal : Star Jennifer Love Hewitt on growing up in showbiz, her friendship with Betty White and her aha moment with her daughter. Meet the Principal who added the role of bus driver to her duties to ensure all her students had a ride home during the pandemic.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Best of Digital with Andy Cohen, Gayle King, Sean Evans, "50 First Dates" Reunion Sketch : Drew's best of digital hour! Drew’s sit-downs with "Watch What Happens Live" Host Andy Cohen, "CBS This Morning" Co-Host Gayle King and "Hot Ones" host Sean Evans. Plus, a look at how our "50 First Dates" reunion sketch with Adam Sandler came together.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci, "Hubie Halloween" Noah Schnapp : Drew continues the week-long Halloween celebration with "The Witches" star Stanley Tucci. Leo Kelly joins to make a mocktail. "Hubie Halloween" star Noah Schnapp stops by to chat. Plus, Design by Drew Scarrymore and the Drew Scarrymore Costume Challenge.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Beauty Week Kick-Off with Supermodel Iman, Max Greenfield, America’s Youngest Beauty Store Owner : Drew kicks off Beauty Week with Supermodel and founder of IMAN Cosmetics Iman. In "Drew & A," Drew and Iman help solve audience members beauty dilemmas. Max Greenfield stops by. Then, meet America’s youngest beauty supply store owner Paris McKenzie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jessica Capshaw, Rage Baking : Netflix’s "Holidate" star Jessica Capshaw stops by to chat. Then, Drew enlists finance expert Farnoosh Torabi and psychologist Dr. Aliza Pressman who share tips on how to talk to your kids about money. Drew and Ross Matthews try-out "Rage Baking."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: James Corden, “Drew’s Love Bug” Dating Apps, The Weekender : James Corden gets candid on hosting a daily show. Drew dives into the world of dating apps enlisting a dating expert to share tips in the latest installment of “Drew’s Love Bug.” Drew gives a curated list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: “The Talk” Hosts, Chef Pilar Valdes, Benito Skinner aka “Benny Drama" : “The Talk” Hosts Sharon Osbourne, Sheryl Underwood, Carrie Ann Inaba, Amanda Kloots, & Elaine Welteroth chat. Pilar Valdes makes a Peppery Steak. Meet America’s youngest hot dog entrepreneur 14 y.o. Mason Wright. TikTok star Benny Drama joins Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Carrie Underwood, 7-Year-Old Raises Money For Hospital, 3 Ways To Use Pantone’s Color of the Year : Music superstar Carrie Underwood chats. Meet 7-year-old Hayley Orlinsky who after hearing the frontline workers were running out of PPE decided to sell homemade bracelets to raising more than $27,000. Drew shares 3 ways to use Pantone’s color of the year.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Galentine’s Day Show! Ayesha Curry, Lana Condor, Jill Kargman : It’s our special Galentine’s Day show where Drew spends the entire hour celebrating women! Sweet July Founder Ayesha Curry, actress Jill Kargman and “To All The Boys: Always and Forever, Lara Jean” star Lana Condor all stop by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Billy Gardell & Folake Olowofoyeku, Break The Cycle: Bad Sleep Habits, Drew’s News with Kat Graham : “Bob Hearts Abishola” stars Billy Gardell and Folake Olowofoyeku stop by. Dr. Thanuja Hamilton who shares the biggest causes of not being able to fall asleep and tips to overcome those restless nights. Actress Kat Graham joins Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Stephen King, Amy Brenneman, Ben Schwartz, TikTok Food Trends with Michelle Park : “Later” author Stephen King stops by to chat. “Tell Me Your Secrets” star Amy Brenneman joins Drew. “Flora & Ulysses” star Ben Schwartz joins Drew and Ross in Drew’s News. Plus, Drew tries the latest food trends on TikTok with chef Michelle Park.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Craig Ferguson, The Bella Twins, #GrandGoals, Cooking with Chef Pilar Valdes : Craig Ferguson stops by. Niki & Brie Bella on their memoir. Drew introduces new seg "#GrandGoals," highlighting amazing grandparents out there and kicks things off with a grandma who just graduated college. Pilar Valdes whips up Tomatillo-Poblano soup.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Nick Offerman, Fashion Tailoring, Mae Whitman, Kevin Frazier Oscar Nominations : “The Great North” star Nick Offerman stops by to chat. “Good Girls” star Mae Whitman joins Drew. Plus, in all new Drew’s News Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are joined by Entertainment Tonight Co-Host Kevin Frazier to discuss Oscar nominations.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Comedian Gabriel Iglesias, "Friendsgiving" Cast : Host of Nickelodeon’s new animal talent show "Unleashed" comedian Gabriel Iglesias shares with Drew one of his favorite acts. Cast of the new film "Friendsgiving" including Malin Akerman, Kat Dennings, Aisha Tyler and Chelsea Peretti stop by to chat.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Katey Sagal, Mom Confessions with Jenny Mollen, Melissa Gorga, Jimmy Tatro : “Rebel's” Katey Sagal chats. “RHONJ's” Melissa Gorga surprises three moms with a kid-free day out they’ll never forget. Jenny Mollen creates a space for moms to clear the air in a new segment. “Home Economics's” Jimmy Tatro joins Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Julianna Margulies, “Outer Banks” star Chase Stokes, Eitan Bernath Shares Favorite Summer Dish : Actress Julianna Margulies stops by to discuss her new memoir “Sunshine Girl: An Unexpected Life.” Then, “Outer Banks” star Chase Stokes joins Drew. Culinary contributor Eitan Bernath whips up his favorite summer dish a watermelon feta arugula salad.

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Shocking Results… Where Are They Now? : Today on MAURY, we’ll get you caught up with some of our most exciting guests. Their paternity results shocked everyone. What happened after the answers were revealed and these guests went back to their lives?

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Women At War! Shocking Test Results! : On Today’s MAURY these men say they know a paternity test will reveal what they’ve known all along – they didn't father the children of the women who brought them here. The women are ready to prove them wrong!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: I'll Prove Her Baby's Not Mine! : These women are here with some burning questions! Kendra wants her husband Richard to admit he’s the father of their child AND his mistress’ child! Jevon and his family don’t think he’s the father of Jazmine’s child! Only MAURY has the answers!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: I'll Prove Your 5 Kids Are Not Mine! : Eddie’s mom Grace won’t let them live with her unless Kay Kay can prove that her son Eddie fathered her grandchild. programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kung Fu Hillbilly! : Sarah's here for Jonathan. The only problem is Lana, her best friend, who just happens to be Jonathan's girlfriend. Next Kung-fu family feud! David's here to let his brother, Lil Wayne, know that he has been sleeping with his girlfriend Ashley.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Three Sisters Share A Man! : Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: My Mom's Marrying My Man! : Regina tells her daughter, Angela, that she is getting married to her ex-boyfriend! Next Suzanne is tired of her boyfriend complaining about her job as an exotic entertainer. Then Tanya is here to tell Bryan's wife about their affair.

programme.title: Steve Harvey Show
programme.desc: Women's Dating Styles : Steve's exclusive update with Rielle Hunter, former mistress of John Edwards! A panel of men analyze three woman's dating styles. And Steve surprises a super fan!

programme.title: Steve Harvey Show

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Our Love Went Viral : Trevor and his wife DeLessa are no strangers to the reality television world. But Trevor believes DeLessa has taken things too far and doesn't prioritize their family and relationship. DeLessa says being on social media is how she makes money.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: Unlock The Phone Has Shocking Surprise : Raven and Tony met online, and before you knew it, they were moving in together. But Tony believes that Raven is cheating and lying to him. He wants Raven to unlock her phone and prove her loyalty.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.desc: 5 Year Relationship…We’ve Never Met : Tameeka met her boyfriend online and is ready to take the next step in their relationship. But her friends and family are trying to put the kibosh on things. Why? Her family members, Jenna and Angela, believe that Tameeka is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Royal Agricultural University, Cirencester : Objects include what could be the most valuable picture ever seen on the show, and a tea caddy.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Newstead Abbey : Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a visit to Newstead Abbey; among the discoveries are a medal for bravery awarded to a pigeon in World War Two.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Towneley Hall : Fiona Bruce and the team arrive at Towneley Hall near Burnley in Lancashire; despite heavy rain, thousands arrive to show their family treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Scottish National Gallery of Modern Art : Fiona Bruce and the team head to Scotland where a large crowd awaits the experts at the National Gallery of Modern Art in Edinburgh; objects include a small carved ivory figure from the 18th century and an original manuscript by Robert Burns.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Retrospective : Fiona Bruce looks back on the most talked about finds of 2013 with updates on star items from the year.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Royal Ballet School, Richmond 1 : Fiona Bruce and the team visit the Royal Ballet School at Richmond Park in London; objects brought to camera include exquisitely modeled porcelain figures made by ballerina Anna Pavlova and a long bow reputed to have been used in World War II.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Sainsbury Centre Norwich : Objects include the death mask of William Gladstone and a complete kitchen from the 1950s.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Exeter Cathedral 1 : Objects include a table used by Bonnie Prince Charlie, a silver cup, and a painting by Edward VII.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Scone Palace 1 : Family brooch; a 15th-century book; The Clash concert T-shirts bought more than 30-years ago; a tea caddy from the 1780s.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wentworth Woodhouse 2 : Objects under inspection include a special medal awarded for kindness to pit ponies; a painted Georgian tea tray; a Bible that belonged to the first black professional footballer; rare Fabergé egg.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow Detectives
programme.desc: Graham Lay investigates an embroidered tablecloth; covered in signatures, it was made by female prisoners in a Japanese internment camp during World War II.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Hillsborough Castle : The `Antiques Roadshow' returns for its 35th year as a favorite on Britain's TV screens, an occasion marked by a very special visit from Her Majesty the Queen to meet members of the team at Hillsborough Castle in Northern Ireland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Kirby Hall 1 : The team find a vintage TV set and a jade bowl once used as a butter dish.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Exeter Cathedral 2 : Treasures featured include Chinese objects which revealed a shocking family secret and rare artworks by the sculptor Elisabeth Frink.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: First Stop : The Ricardos and the Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. Ricky is driving and sacrifices his passengers' appetites for the sake of making mileage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Tennesse Bound : The Ricardos and the Mertzes are arrested when they're caught speeding in Bent Fork, Tennessee. Although Ricky just wants to pay the fine, Lucy protests that they are being treated unfairly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel's Home Town : The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: L.A. At Last : After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Don Juan and the Starlets : Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets In Pictures : Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fashion Show : Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Hedda Hopper Show : Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Don Juan Is Shelved : Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Bullfight Dance : Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hollywood Anniversary : Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Star Upstairs : Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In Palm Springs : Lucy and Ricky, and Fred and Ethel are fed up with each other's annoying habits and decide they all need a break. They split up for a brief vacation and Lucy and Ethel decide they'll go to Palm Springs for a girls-only good time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Harpo Marx : Caroline Appleby is visiting from New York and is excited to see all the stars Lucy had promised. Of course Lucy exaggerated her access to celebrities but plans on fooling her nearsighted friend.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Dancing Star : Lucy's friend Caroline Abbleby decides she'll pay Lucy a visit while on her way to Hawaii, and can't wait for Lucy to introduce her to all the stars she has supposedly befriended. Lucy's only solution is to trick her friend and set the stage for deceit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Needs An Agent : Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Tour : Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Visits Grauman's : The Ricardos are going back to New York in one week and Lucy is determined not to leave Hollywood with the proper souvenirs. She's already got a box full of memorabilia but she still wants more.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy And John Wayne : Lucy, while souvenir collecting, lifted a cement block with John Wayne's footprints from Grauman's Chinese Theatre, and now a newspaper is reporting that she was seen and her arrest is imminent.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy And The Dummy : Chip Jackson of MGM asks Ricky to perform at a party but he refuses in favor of a deep-sea fishing retreat. Lucy has a better idea - she tells Mr. Jackson that Ricky would be glad to appear.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Face To Face : Ricky Ricardo's new fame leads to an invitation to appear on a television interview program. The live interview is to take place in their home and Ricky's new agent wants them to move to a more posh apartment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Goes To The Rodeo : Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Nursery School : Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky's European Booking : Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Passports : Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Staten Island Ferry : Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Bon Voyage : The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Second Honeymoon : Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Meets The Queen : Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fox Hunt : Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Lemon : When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Impounded : Grimlock's quest for an effective disguise goes into overdrive when QUILLFIRE returns and Bumblebee and Strongarm find themselves stuck in an impound lot.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Portals : Fixit's efforts to repair the GroundBridge go horribly awry, instead summoning two of the most legendary and fearsome Decepticons to the Scrapyard – and banishing Bumblebee to another dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Graduation Exercises : Trying to show how effective they are without their teacher's direction, Slipstorm and Jetstorm inadevertently put Drift in harm's way and must come to their master's aid before he is destroyed by STOCKADE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Decepticon Island, Part 1 : With the Bee Team and the Away Team reunited, the Autobots, joined by an old friend, locate and investigate Decepticon Island, and unexpectedly find Steeljaw in charge of an army of Decepticons!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Decepticon Island, Part 2 : Badly outnumbered and trapped on Decepticon Island, the Autobots desperately search for a way to take out Steeljaw and put his army of fugitives in stasis, but friction between Bumblebee and Optimus could put the mission – and all of Earth – at risk!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: History Lessons : Bumblebee's guided tour of Earth brings the Bee Team to Optimus Prime's old base, but Sideswipe doesn't have any use for history.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Strongarm's Big Score : When Strongarm surprisingly scores the lowest on a skills test created by Fixit, she's determined to improve her score.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Pretzel Logic : Not wanting the over-­‐aggressive Dinobot to compromise his team's quest to capture the scavenger Decepticons and their Mini-­‐Cons, Bee sends Grimlock on a "solo mission" to the Alps.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Mighty Big Trouble : The Scavengers find a most unexpected relic, even as their mysterious Mini-­‐Cons make their escape and their even more unexpected pursuer, Starscream, arrives on Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Mini–Con Madness : Starscream gloats over his impending victory, unaware that Optimus Prime has arrived to help the remaining Autobots. After being surprised by, and taken over by, the Mini-­‐Cons, the heroes ally with the Mini-­‐Cons, who share their secrets with the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Worthy : Starscream tries to absorb the power of six of the Mini-­‐Cons, but needs the seventh to obtain the ultimate power he craves for his revenge.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: King Of The Hill –Part 1 : Overconfidence leaves the Bee Team unprepared when they face a Stunticon that can fire guided missiles...on the desert ground above a nuclear waste disposal site!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: King Of The Hill –Part 2 : Bumblebee struggles to bring his out-of-practice team to combat readiness as they square off against the missiles and oil barrel traps of Stunticon Heatseeker.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Defrosted : Grimlock begs to learn new fighting methods from reluctant "teacher" Drift –but Grimlock's initial attempts to put Drift's lessons into action fall comically flat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Blurred : While recovering one of Windblade's hidden caches, the Autobots run into Rescue Bot Blurr.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Sphere Of Influence : The Bee Team captures a Skunkticonwho's obsessively guarding a strange Sphere-shaped artifact. The curious Sphere bears a more than passing resemblance to a mythical relic that can reveal the location of the lost city of Doradus.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bee Cool : BLURR continues on as SIDESWIPE's intern while BUMBLEBEE discovers a replacement Decepticon Hunter exists in Windblade's hidden cache on the island town of WEST ROCK CITY. Unfortunately, Stunticons DRAG STRIP and WILDCHASE find the cache first.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Great Divide : When Stunticon Drag Strip steals a powerful Cybertronian artifact known as a Gravitic Adjuster, the Bee Team gives chase but arecaught in an explosion that once again fuses them into the Ultra Bee Team Combiner (UBTC).

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Get A Clue : A string of mysterious explosives thefts leave the Bee Team flummoxed, but Strongarm is convinced that there's a criminal mastermind at work.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Out Of The Shadows : DRIFT's former mentor SHADOW RAKER ,a Fagin-like thief, has come to Earth to reclaim what he believes to be rightfully his — JETSTORM and SLIPSTREAM!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Disordered Personalities : After Fixit's latest attempt at combining the team, the Autobots ends up swapping bodies! They then discover that the Stunticons have entered the local Grand Prix assuming that whomever winswillbe crowned the literal "ruler of the roads."

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Guilty As Charged : Strongarm's best friend from her time at the Police Academy, Chicane, shows up at the Scrapyard.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Golden Knight : When Fixit discovers an ancient Cybertronian signal originating on an island off the coast of England, he begs Bumblebee to tag along on the investigation.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Fastest Bot Alive! : When FIXIT attempts to sample GRIMLOCK's DNA for a bot-combiner experiment, his Particle Sampler instead invests the once-slow Dinobot with dangerous superspeed!

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Survival Of The Fittest : The Autobots go face to face with two new Decepticons, Lugnut and Blitzwing.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Headmaster : Sari is kidnapped, and the evidence points to the Dinobots. So Prowl and Bulkhead head to a mysterious island to investigate with a highly suspicious Captain Fanzone on their tail.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Nature Calls : One of Sumdac's ex-workers takes control of an Autobot. He then takes the Autobot out on the town.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Megatron Rising, Part 1 : Prowl, Bumblebee and Sari head into the forest to find the source of mysterious Cybertronian energy readings.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Megatron Rising, Part 2 : When Starscream, Lugnut and Blitzwing begin their invasion of Earth, Optimus Prime demands Sari hand over her key for safekeeping. This causes her to run away, only to end up in the clutches of Blackarachnia.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Elite Guard : Now that Megatron's body is rebuilt, he leads the Decepticons in his search for the AllSpark. When the Autobots fail to defend the Earth from the Decepticons, they must fight harder than ever to protect the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: The Return Of The Headmaster : Optimus Prime and his band of Autobots are taken off the job when the Cybertron Elite Guard, led by Ultra Magnus, comes to Earth looking for the AllSpark.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Mission Accomplished : Optimus teams up with Sentinel Prime in order to defeat the Headmaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Garbage In, Garbage Out : Unaware of the Decepticon activity, the Elite Guard take Optimus Prime and the Autobots back to Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Velocity : The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: Rise Of The Constructicons : Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers: Animated
programme.desc: A Fistful Of Energon : When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends. However, the Decepticons have other plans in mind.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Hello Jell-O : Mike stumbles on a century-old Jell-O ice cream wagon worth thousands; Robbie makes a huge offer on an iconic Ford.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pickin' Perry-Dise : The guys pick an Appalachian village museum; Danielle is unimpressed with the pool candidates she's met to manage the new store; a father and son duo open the doors to their staggering collection.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: 8th Grade Humor : The guys freestyle on their home turf in Iowa; Frank has a few practical jokes up his sleeve; George opens the doors to his heavenly collection; the guys find themselves picking with a local history buff; Roger's has a 3,000-square-foot mega-pick.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Doctor Is In : The guys discover "Forevertron" in Wisconsin; a spare parts collection; a general store has been closed for 60 years.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Texas Treasures : In the heart of oil country, a family's vintage service station resembles a petroliana museum where the inventory is all off-limits.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Junkyard Wizard : A junkyard wizard has an Oktoberfest gem with Frank Fritz's name written all over it.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Who's the Rarest of Them All? : The guys are in in Studebaker heaven; a visit to a designer with the rarest collection in the Midwest.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Doctor Is Waiting : Mike and Frank are scolded when they arrive late for an appointment with Dr. Fred; once they get past his grumpy assistant, they find themselves in a strange world filled with all kinds of weird and wonderful things.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Roll Like a Rock Star : When the guys get a lead on what could be Aerosmith's original tour van, they head out on a cross-country trek in search of the holy grail of rock 'n' roll relics.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Urban Cowboys : The guys see a sign for Gilley's Club; Mickey Gilley's jam-packed warehouse; Paul's sprawling junkyard; peanut factory.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pinball Mania : Mike and Frank dig through a building full of dead coin-operated games; the mother-lode of pop culture pinball machines; John's collection of rare motorcycles.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Enter the Negotiator : The guys are invited to pick a Vermont property packed with "petroliana;" Mike tackles two projects in Iowa; Frank and Dave try to buy an ultra-rare cycle car in Florida.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: From Coupe to Nuts : Mike and Frank are unwelcome visitors while freestyling in the Northeast; rehabbing an uncommon and rusty '33 Ford Coupe.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Shocked and Loaded : The guys encounter a mad scientist who creates his own lightning and hypnotizes Frank.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Planes, Frames and Automobiles : Mike and Frank negotiate with the sibling owners of an antique shop closed since the 1970s; the guys come upon a historic aircraft with an amazing back-story.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: My Sweet Ford : Mike and Frank find a classic 1933 Ford that's been sitting so long that a tree has grown around it, but nothing will stop them from rescuing this rare ride.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W., The Picky Eater/Buster And The Daredevils : It's wrong to call D.W. a picky eater. The only things she won't eat are vegetables, fish, fruit, and meat. Then, Arthur and Buster meet two really cool kids and, naturally, are utterly dazzled. How far will Buster go to be cool?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room! : Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Underwear/Francine Frensky, Olympic Rider : Arthur thinks it's hilarious when Binky Barnes' pants split during class--until he starts having nightmares about it happening to him. Then, Francine secretly dreams of being an Olympic equestrienne, but first she has to learn to ride.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster Baxter, Cat Saver/Play It Again, D.W. : A cat gets stuck in a tree and Buster Baxter saves the day! Risking life and limb! Next, the ridiculous Crazy Bus song is EVERYWHERE, but mostly it's in the Read's home, because D.W. has to play it 4000 times a day.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Tv-Free Week/Night Fright : The kids and parents of Ellwood City have all pledged not to watch TV for one whole week. Can they last? Then, big, brave Binky Barnes would be toast if people ever discovered he can't sleep without a night light.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur vs. The Piano/The Big Blow-Up : Arthur gets stage fright during a rehearsal. Will he be able to get through his recital without any mistakes? Then, two opinionated friends butt heads! Can Francine and The Brain put aside their differences for the good of the soccer team?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Lost!/The Short, Quick Summer : One day, Arthur falls asleep on a bus and awakens in a strange part of town. Will he ever find his way home? Can he keep himself from crying? Next, summer vacation is over? What about all those great, fun things Arthur intended to do?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. Goes To Washington/Arthur's Mystery Envelope : D.W.'s on her way to Washington and she's bored by it all until she gets lost during a tour of the White House. Then, when Mr. Haney gives Arthur a sealed envelope to bring home to Mom, Arthur fears the worst.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W.'s Deer Friend/Buster Hits the Books : It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Faraway Friend/Arthur and The Square Dance : Arthur's in the midst of writing a great adventure story with Buster when he gets some very bad news--Buster is leaving town to go live with his Dad for a while. Then, does Francine have a crush on Arthur?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Water and The Brain/Arthur The Unfunny : Is The Brain a snob? That seems to be the explanation for why he won't go to Waterworld with his friends. And, Arthur's a notorious joke-killer. But when he's scheduled to perform as a carnival clown, he learns how to make people laugh!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sue Ellen's Lost Diary/Arthur's Knee : Poor Sue Ellen has lost the one thing she's never without--her diary. Then, Arthur's hurt his knee but won't tell Mom--because then she'd know he'd been playing down at the dump , where he was NOT allowed to go.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Grandma Thora Appreciation Day/Fern's Slumber Party : Arthur and D.W. are planning a surprise party for Grandma Thora. But amidst the party-planning mayhem, they forget about the guest of honor! Then, shy Fern hosts a slumber party at her mother's urging.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Love Notes For Muffy/D.W. Blows The Whistle : When Muffy tries to bribe the judges at the school science fair, Francine and The Brain plot revenge. And D.W., a newly-deputized Junior Safety Officer, has a reputation for being a strict enforcer of the rules--well, OK, a tattle-tale.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine Redecorates/Arthur The Loser : Francine and Catherine are very different, but it’s no fun if you're two sisters sharing the same room. Then, there's only one thing in life Arthur really wants—to win! But he just can't stop losing. Is it really so wrong to cheat a little?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur vs. The Very Mean Crossing Guard/D.W.'s Very Bad Mood : Arthur and The Brain encounter a new crossing guard on the way home from school. This guard isn't just mean, he's nuts! And, D.W. is making Arthur's life miserable! Francine decides she'd fix D.W.'s behavior before Arthur loses his mind.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W.'s Name Game/Finders Key-Pers : D.W. and Arthur get their feelings hurt when their efforts to insult each other get out of control. Next, Arthur, Brain, and Binky find a key--but to what? And which of them will get to keep whatever fabulous thing they find with it?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: How The Cookie Crumbles/Sue Ellen's Littler Sister : What's a budding entrepreneur to do when her homemade cookies hit the big time? Especially when the recipe isn't really hers? Then, Arthur and Francine would love to lend their sisters to Sue Ellen, who's sick of being an only child.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster's Back/The Ballad Of Buster Baxter : Buster's coming home! The word spreads fast, but so does the fear that Buster will be different. Then, it seems to Buster, not only have his friends changed while he was gone, but they've forgotten all about him! Will he ever fit in again?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W., All Fired Up/I'd Rather Read It Myself : When Ms. Morgan announces they'll be having a fire drill during preschool, D.W. wants no part of it--it sounds way too scary. Then, the Tibble Twins are better than D.W. at just about everything.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Goes Crosswire/Sue Ellen And The Brainasaurous : Since they rescued Wilbur Rabbit, Arthur and Muffy have been inseparable. But the rest of their friends are growing tired of the new Arthur. And, Brain's a great partner for a school assignment--unless you wanted to work on it, too!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: What Is That Thing?/Buster's Best Behavior : Arthur and friends are all faced with seemingly impossible tasks, from fixing a model biplane to babysitting D.W. And, Buster knows he's fun, but he's beginning to feel like he's not particularly good at anything.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show! : It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur And The Big Riddle/Double Dare : Alex Trebek lends his voice as gameshow host Alex Lebek in this episode which poses the age-old riddle--is winning really everything? What if your friends dared you to skip homework--and then double dared you to skip school?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Kids Are From Earth, Parents Are From Pluto/Nerves Of Steal : It’s Lakewood Elementary Parents Open House! How will the kids survive a whole evening of their parents' embarrassing antics? Buster is the only kid in Elwood City who doesn't have a Cybertoy, so he decides to 'borrow' one from the store.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The World Record/The Cave : Why is Buster walking backwards and Muffy not talking? They're trying to set world records of course! Then, Arthur thinks his class trip to the Clark Caves will be really cool--but won't it be dark in there?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur : An army of lice has descended on the heads of Lakewood Elementary. Who or what is strong enough to defeat them? What if you could be Arthur for a day? View Arthur's life through his very own eyes for this special episode.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Election/Francine Goes To War : There’s a mock election in Mr. Ratburn's class, but Muffy takes it seriously. How far will she go to win? Francine can't believe it. She gets in trouble no matter what she does -- thanks to the new nosy next-door neighbor!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved : Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Last of Mary Moo Cow/Bitzi's Beau : When Mary Moo Cow is cancelled, D.W. is devastated. How can television--or life as she knows it--ever be the same? Buster hasn't yet met Bitzi's new boyfriend, but he fears the worst. What if he is a Mom-stealer?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Just Desserts/The Big Dig : Arthur has a hard time resisting sweets, and one evening his overindulgence wins him an upset stomach and some 'Grimm' dreams. Arthur and D.W. loved it when Grandpa Dave came to visit--but now he only wants to sleep and play checkers.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sue Ellen Gets Her Goose Cooked/Best of The Nest : Sue Ellen is the champion of the popular Internet game, Virtualgoose.com, but she’s become obsessed! And now the gang has moved onto Best of the Nest. Will any of his friends be willing to forgo their computers for a real, live adventure?

programme.title: Catch the Bullet
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal returns home from the trail to discover his 12-year-old son has been kidnapped by outlaws.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver (Dax Shepard) finds feds and his former gang members on his tail when he breaks out of the Witness Protection Program to help his girlfriend (Kristen Bell) get to Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A sheriff must take matters into his own hands when a notorious drug lord escapes from FBI custody and comes speeding toward a showdown in the lawman's quiet border town.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: A sadistic Chicago lawman comes to 1931 Virginia to shut down the Bondurant brothers' bootlegging business.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman who's in Bangkok to pull off a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman and bonds with his errand boy.

programme.title: The Winning Season
programme.desc: Increasingly estranged from his own daughter, a boozy busboy (Sam Rockwell) gets a shot at redemption when an old friend (Rob Corddry) hires him to coach a varsity girls basketball team.

programme.title: Cold Mountain
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: During the era of Tammany Hall's sway, a young man (Leonardo DiCaprio) vows vengeance on the vicious gangster (Daniel Day-Lewis) who killed his father.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programme.desc: Trina & Scorpio : Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Dorion & Jeszica : Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Lucille & Kidd Cole : Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ashley & Mike : For over seven years, Ashley has sent dramatically altered photos of herself to her soul mate, Mike, to make her look thinner and more attractive to him.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ayissha & Sydney : Sydney and Ayissha were in an online romance for years before Sydney revealed she is not who she says. But Ayissha still loves her and seeks Nev and Max's help. (S4, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Andria & David : David is the only love Andria has ever known. Love letters and voice messages make Andria stay. But having never met after 10 years, she needs to know what he is hiding that keeps him away. (S4, ep15)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Craig & Zoe : Craig's sister introduced him to a beautiful girl named Zoe on Facebook. After talks online of a future life together, things turn sour. Now he wants to know who he gave his heart to.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tyler & Amanda : After a year and a half of chatting with her online, Tyler thinks he may have a future with Amanda. But are Tyler's friends correct because they suspect that something isn't right?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nick & Melissa : Nick and Melissa fell in love at age 12 when they met on an online chat room. Now 18, Nick is ready to meet Melissa. But is Melissa the real deal or has Nick been entangled in lies?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Tracie & Sammie : Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie' after hearing about the passing of Sammie's friend. Sammie suddenly disappeared and now Tracie is left wondering who Sammie really is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Sunny & Jamison : Sunny is in love with the man of her dreams. Jamison is a model, a TV writer, and also studying to be an anaesthesiologist. However, the pair have never met. Is Jamison too good to be true?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jesse & Brian : Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: John & Kelsey : John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.desc: Juicy J : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Academy Award-winning rapper Juicy J gets everyone to "Bounce It", while providing a fresh take on "Wake Up Bake Up" and shows why for some girls it's just "Not Twerking Out".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Tyler Posey : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes Teen Wolf star Tyler Posey as they give a salute to modern "Fartistry", talk about what it's like to have "Wolfsense", and teach us to "Say No To Buds".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Prom : Rob, Sterling, and Chanel get ready for prom with "Prom Practice", check out online dating disasters with "Should've Swiped Left" and highlight the dangers of showing up "Drunk On Arrival."

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Vampires of the Deep : Extreme angler Jeremy embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest to find an ancient river monster said to rise from the depths to attack swimmers.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Amazon Titanic : Supreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to South America to hunt for a seriously gargantuan fish found in the dark depths of the Amazon River.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Invisible Killers : Jeremy has tracked down freshwater killers for 30 years, but now he's discovered that he was sharing those waters with darker, deadlier creatures - parasites.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Weapons : Jeremy Wade recalls his many battles against dangerous water creatures, and the techniques and weapons he used to survive these encounters.

programme.title: River Monsters: Untold Stories
programme.desc: Lethal Legends : Do underwater creatures with grasping hands stalk children in Japan; and is a murderous river spirit wreaking havoc on the Zambezi? Jeremy Wade investigates.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The Deadliest Encounters : Jeremy Wade is back and recalls his top ten battles with forgotten monsters from the deep. Meet the prehistoric alligator gar and the enormous wels catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Sharks & Rays : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: The Deadliest Catfish : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most frightening encounters with the world's deadliest catfish. What makes this type of fish so supremely dominant?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Untold Stories : Jeremy Wades shares untold tales and previously unseen footage from his many adventures.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Top Ten Beasts : Jeremy Wade is back and recalls his top ten battles with forgotten monsters from the deep. Meet the prehistoric alligator gar and the enormous wels catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river. Armed with only old journals and his rod, Jeremy is on a mission to discover if monsters of the past still exist.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Killer Sharks & Rays : Jeremy Wade relives some of his most dangerous catches.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Top Ten Beasts : Jeremy Wade is back and recalls his top ten battles with forgotten monsters from the deep. Meet the prehistoric alligator gar and the enormous wels catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy Wade explores the Essequibo, Guyana's largest river. Armed with only old journals and his rod, Jeremy is on a mission to discover if monsters of the past still exist.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Lair of Giants : Jeremy continues his exploration of South Africa's rivers and lakes, tackling an 11-foot black caiman and sitting alongside a 17-foot anaconda.

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Best of Series 1-5 : Jeremy Wade's voyages have taken him across the globe to waterways far and wide on an endless search for man-eating creatures that lurk beneath.

programme.title: Pluto TV Adventure

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Tower of Power : Natasha risks profit and time when signals get crossed on the dimensions of a massive radio tower, while Dwight and Tyesha fear becoming the villains after a load of super hero statues get roughed up under their watch.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: The Creature and the Wine : A massive animatronic creature with a one-day deadline is nightmare fuel for Molly and Russell, while Tamara has dreams of a sweet payday getting an oversized wine barrel across the country.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Playing with Fire : Natasha's big rig is in question when she takes on transporting a vintage fire truck to its original home, while Molly and Russell's load filled with Hollywood memorabilia is crate filled with issues.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Skills USA : Mike attends the SkillsUSA National Competition in Kansas City, Missouri, and tries his hand at welding, cake decorating, and broadcasting. Spoiler Alert: He’s not good!

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: STEAM Circus : Mike visits the Two-Bit Circus in Los Angeles, California, where disruptive innovators have added an A to STEM to make it STEAM—Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Math.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: CalTrans : Mike meets the man who is pulling millions of pounds of trash from America’s waterways.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Aircraft Carrier Part 1 : In this two-episode segment, Mike and his crew take you deep inside the workings of the largest ship in the US Navy, the USS John Stennis.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Aircraft Carrier Part 2 (intro) : From the mess hall to the flight deck, Mike does every job on the ship, and along the way learns the history of these floating cities.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Lowrider : Mike learns the history of lowrider culture from the Fuentes brothers of Homies Hydraulics and gets tricked into competing in a crazy car-jumping contest.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Bobblehead / Cigar Box Guitar : Mike learns the ups and downs of bobblehead making from the folks at Royal Bobble in Atlanta.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Ornithologist : Mike does some serious bird watching at the North Carolina Museum of Natural Sciences and assists Lead Ornithologist John Gerwin in teaching the next generation of bird lovers.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Sheepherding : Mike embraces his inner K9 and learns firsthand how dogs get trained by master trainer and owner of Action K9 Sports, Terry Parrish.

programme.title: Somebody's Gotta Do It
programme.desc: Dragon Forge : Mike visits the Dragon Forge shop where father and son blacksmiths Craig and Rory May teach him how to bend steel using old-time, anvil-banging, heavy metal forging.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Sturgeon Spearing : Michigan's District 3 is home to the state's only sturgeon spearing season. The limit is low, but the reward can be a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: U.P. Snowmobile Patrol : Michigan Conservation Officers in the U.P. have a lengthy snowmobile season to patrol. From sound checks to safe riding on trails, it's never a dull day in the snow.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Shining Surveillance Part 1 : There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Shining Surveillance Part 2 : There's no shining for wildlife on public ground during the month of November in Michigan. To comabt that, an aerial patrol at night is utilized.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: First Day of Deer Season : Michigan hunters harvested the second most whitetails in the country. Keeping track of everyone in the field requires near 24/7 surveillance.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Illegal Blinds : Hunting blinds can not be left on state land year-round. When officers find blinds that need to be removed, they search high and low for the owners.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Bears in the U.P. : It can take 7 years to draw a bear tag in Michigan's U.P. Conservation Officers make sure everyone plays by the same rules, so no one has an advantage.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Westside Fishing : The westside of Michigan has some of the state's best fishing spots. From inland rivers to the Great Lakes, C.O.s know their fall will be spent watching anglers.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Best of: Michigan Whitetail Patrol : Michigan's archery deer season lasts 77 days and the regular firearm season is 16 days long. Over that time period, C.O.'s use a variety of tactics to make sure everyone is playing by the rules.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Pure Michigan : The state of Michigan is highlighted through a contest to win hunting licenses and over $4000 in prizes. Officers also patrol during a summer boating festival and the firearm deer season.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: T-Wrecks : As Dwight and Tyesha tangle with an animatronic T-Rex and chop it down to size, Doug bites off more than he can chew when moving a massive backyard Pirate Ship playhouse.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Bowling for Candy : Molly and Russell get boxed in by the seller of a rare arcade bowling game with his shipping demands, while Tamara's haul of movie statues to Minnesota's largest candy store heats up with a large, flame-throwing side load.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Golf Claps and Bumper Car Scraps : Natasha is amused by her classic bumper car haul but will the ride stay intact on her rig? Meanwhile, Tamara's mini-golf run turns south quickly when the 12 piece pick up turns into a 100 item load.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Ghosts and Floats : Molly and Russell discover that the "magic of movies" is just an illusion when they attempt to haul an iconic picture car for a film premiere.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Here's the Throne, Here's the Steeple : A giant church steeple makes Natasha question her faith in a forklift, when she's the lone soul to complete the task of loading it. And winter comes for Dwight and Tyesha with a royal run comprising of a beautifully handcrafted throne.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Glamping on a Gondola : A load of vintage ski gondolas take Molly and Russell from the mountains of Vermont to the Colorado Rockies on a run that is somehow, only an uphill climb.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
